business_definition: A Vellum-derived mismatch between expected and observed financial/operational states across one or more sources.

fields.break_id: The normalized identifier for the reconciliation break.
fields.entity_id: Entity associated with the break where applicable.
fields.account_id: Account associated with the break where applicable.
fields.related_contract_ids: The set of source or derived contract records involved in the break.
fields.status: The current normalized break lifecycle state.
fields.detected_at: Timestamp when the break was detected.
fields.explanation: A short explanation of the break.
